text:
Created attachment 247368
Update to 535.104.05 with removed PORTREVISION

(In reply to N.J. Mann from comment #2)

First, I apologize for delay in answer. For some reason, I don't get any mails, either from Bugzilla or mailing lists.

Thank you for testing the patch and the correction. Here is the same patch, with removed PORTREVISION setting, so it should work. ;)

And mandatory, Happy New Year.
